original_image_tags: A faint blue rubber stamp impression, inverted (upside-down) on the page. The stamp contains the following text:

elements.description: Blue stamped text including 'TRANSMITTED', 'JUL 28 3 50 PM 65', and 'McCHORD FIELD FLT. SERV. CENTER'. Two black hole-punch marks are visible at the bottom of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a blue stamp with specific text and two black hole-punch marks, with no contradictions in the quoted content.
